extraction.one_line_summary: GARCIA CORTINA Ivan won stage 3 after HOFSTETTER blocked EWAN from behind and BENNETT crashed, with favorites all waiting too long in hesitant sprint.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked immediately after crash with 10km remaining, forcing SAGAN to bridge and splitting field before sprint.
Lead-out trains completely dissolved by late crashes, causing hesitant sprint where MATTHEWS and SAGAN both waited themselves out of contention.
Israel Start-Up Nation let domestique GARCIA CORTINA who worked all day finish sprint, revealing team prioritization over pure speed.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Second consecutive day showing exceptional strength supporting SCHACHMANN's GC, then bridged to ALAPHILIPPE late attack despite domestique duties.
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: Blocked by HOFSTETTER from behind inside final kilometer after positioning well, suggesting vulnerability in chaotic non-leadout sprints.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Crashed with bloodied hand in sprint finale, taken out by traffic despite being pre-stage favorite.
rider_signals.GARCIA CORTINA Ivan: positive: Worked all day protecting team, then won sprint opportunistically when favorites hesitated after crashes disrupted trains.
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: Led out ACKERMANN then looked across shoulder waiting, missed winning opportunity in hesitant sprint.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Immediately attacked post-crash at 10km to exploit chaos and test GC rivals despite not being sprint contender.
